items.title: 专家称，何时与人工智能聊天机器人讨论心理健康问题，何时保持距离。
items.summary: 一些美国人正在使用人工智能聊天机器人来进行心理治疗。心理健康专家分享了使用这些工具来获得情感支持的安全性和不安全性。
items.title_en: When to talk to AI chatbots about mental health—and when to stay far away, professionals say

items.title: 亚马逊表示，Anthropic的Claude仍然可以在非军事领域继续为AWS客户使用。
items.summary: 亚马逊加入了微软和谷歌，继续向客户提供Anthropic的Claude AI技术，尽管五角大楼认为它是一个“供应链风险”。
items.title_en: Amazon says Anthropic’s Claude still OK for AWS customers to use outside defense work
items.summary_en: Amazon joined Microsoft and Google in continue to offer Anthropic's Claude AI technology to customers after the Pentagon deemed it a "supply chain risk."

items.title_en: Marvell stock surges 18% as CEO points to continuing AI demand: 'Do you see me blinking?'

items.title: 谷歌加入微软，告诉用户 Anthropic仍可用于非国防项目

items.summary_en: Cloud vendors are letting customers know that Anthropic's popular AI tools can still be accessed after the Department of Defense blacklisted the company.

items.title: 人工智能存在性别差距：女性更具怀疑性

items.summary_en: Men are more enthusiastic about AI, while women are more skeptical, according to CNBC's 5th annual SurveyMonkey Women at Work survey.
